dsl_rule.translation_notes: Gapping-Up Doji SHORT signal. Entry: (1) Gap-up opening above previous high, (2) Doji candlestick characterized by small body (body_pct < 5%), (3) Strong volume on breakaway. Exit: Reversal close above open (doji indecision breaks upward). Exhaustion gap pattern implied by gap sequence but not explicitly measurable with available indicators; conservatively captured via gap-up opening + doji + volume confirmation.

source_rule_text: Gapping-Up Doji: A doji candlestick that appears after a gap-up breakout from congestion, typically following an exhaustion gap, marking the end of an uptrend
